title: The Seraphim Hunt Everyone
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Luffy, Unknown person #6, Seraphim as The Seraphim turn against everyone, a traitor among Vegapunk’s satellites emerges, and Egghead becomes the center of a coming world-shaking incident.
scene: The Seraphim turn against everyone, a traitor among Vegapunk’s satellites emerges, and Egghead becomes the center of a coming world-shaking incident.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Tempest kick

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Slaughter!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: One sword style "1a"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Lign's song!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What the?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: you guys are getting up way too fast!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Enough already!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What are you guys, kaido?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now that I think about it, they kinda look like

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That "King" guy I fought in Wano.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Kaidou's crew had a lunarian?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't know what Tribe he was from, or what his name was.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: See

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That man was probably

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Alber, the test subject who escaped from punk hazard with Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Seraphim are strengthened by his lunarian blood.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Really?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If that's the case, keep an eye for the flames on their backs!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our attacks only work when that flame is out!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But when they're on fire, they're almost invincible.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry for making you guys waste energy like that

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I should have noticed sooner...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, it's fine. At least now we know how to fight them.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: King's special features were his white hair, dark skin, black wings, and flames on his back...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You should have noticed way sooner!!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Betrayal through 25 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
